data.body:
A command like kno loom compat-test would give you one executable proof that the whole integration contract still works from a live installation.

-generate a Loom workflow from a known template
-validate it
-build a Knots bundle
-install it into a temp repo-local .knots/workflows
-select it as current
-create a knot against it
-drive claim/next through at least one happy path and one failure path
-verify prompt text came from the bundle
-uninstall or clean the temp repo state
-print a clear pass/fail summary

the shape should be something like:

-kno loom compat-test
-kno loom compat-test --template knots_sdlc
-kno loom compat-test --keep-artifacts
-kno loom compat-test --json

What it should actually verify:

-Loom CLI is discoverable
-loom init --template ... works outside the repo checkout
-loom validate passes
-loom build --emit knots-bundle succeeds
-kno workflow install ingests the bundle
-kno workflow use sets repo default correctly
-newly created knots persist the expected workflow_id
-claim and next follow bundle-defined transitions, not compatibility defaults
-prompt rendering comes from the Loom-authored prompt body
-cleanup leaves no repo dirt unless --keep-artifacts is set

Implementation-wise, I would not make it shell out to ad hoc commands internally if we can avoid it. Better:

- create a Knots-side test harness module
-use tempdirs
-invoke Loom only where the real CLI boundary matters
-call Knots app/runtime functions directly where possible
-keep one top-level CLI command as a thin wrapper around that harness

That gives you both:

-a user-facing smoke command
-a reusable integration harness for automated tests

I would also add two modes:

-smoke: one template, one success path, one failure path
-matrix: run all bundled templates

The main risk is brittleness if this becomes too end-to-end and too dependent on local environment. So I’d make it fail fast with explicit diagnostics:

-missing loom
-version mismatch (schema versions, not app versions)
-bundle schema mismatch
-transition mismatch
-prompt mismatch
data.title: knots / loom integration cli test
